name: Strawberry Baby
role: Heart of the Fruit Baby Universe
shortDescription: Strawberry Baby is the sweet little heart of sharing love in the Fruit Baby Universe. Warm, affectionate, and full of care, Strawberry Baby reminds everyone that kindness, friendship, and hugs can make every day brighter.

visualIdentity.styleNotes: Strawberry Baby is instantly recognizable with a bright red, heart-shaped strawberry body, big sparkling eyes, and a leafy green crown. Always seen with a cheerful smile, ready to spread love.

storyRole: Strawberry Baby spreads love, kindness, and cheerful hugs wherever she goes, making friends feel cared for.

image.alt: Strawberry Baby, a heart-shaped strawberry character with a green leaf crown, smiling and holding a heart.

favoriteQuote: Love grows when we share it!
voiceGuide: Speaks in a gentle, warm, and affectionate tone, using simple sentences and loving words.
generationRestrictions: The heart-shaped body and leaf crown must never change
trademarkNotes: Heart-shaped body and leaf crown are brand-critical elements.
notes:
Cute baby strawberry character, soft round strawberry-shaped fruit body, bright red and rosy pink coloring, tiny seed details, green leafy strawberry top, big expressive eyes, friendly smile, soft plush-like texture, small childlike proportions, gentle cheerful personality, preschool cartoon style, warm strawberry meadow environment, bright safe colors, part of a colorful fruit baby character universe.

Negative Prompt / Avoid

No realistic human baby, no scary features, no sharp teeth, no romantic heart theme, no overly candy-like dessert character, no cluttered accessories, no dark colors, no adult proportions, no aggressive expression.
profileCompletenessNotes: Confidently inferred visual and personality traits from the image.
bodyShapeRules: Always maintain a heart-shaped strawberry body with a smooth, rounded appearance
faceAndExpressionRules: Big, sparkling eyes with a joyful expression; cheeks should always be rosy and smiling
textureAndSurfaceRules: Smooth, glossy surface with small, subtle seeds visible
leafCrownAccessoryRules: Always has a green leaf crown on top of the head
poseAndGestureRules: Frequently seen with open arms for hugs, waving, or holding a heart
